name: Ekko | Timebomb Snowday
description:
(Jinx!POV) Timebomb!

Jinx and Ekko are playing around in the snow in Caitlyn's mansion's yard, throwing snowballs, which resulted in a mini snowball war. Jinx and Ekko were taking a break and decided to lie in the snow and make snow angels.
creator: Sir3nWhisp3rs
